title: INCLUSION SERVICES - 211info
text: PORTLAND PARKS AND RECREATION ADAPTIVE AND INCLUSIVE RECREATION INCLUSION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides guidance and access with people living with disabilities can access Portland Parks and Recreation classes and activities. 1120 SW 5th Avenue Suite 858 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Individuals who have a disability and/or special needs Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 307-4131 , , Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 307-4131 Inclusion, ADA Accommodations Requests, and Complaints Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None for inclusion services; varies for activities. Scholarships available to City of Portland residents only. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: City of Portland SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions General Recreational Activities/Sports * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - ADAPTIVE RECREATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
